search = request.GET.get('search') if search: if "home" in request.get_full_path(): fanfics = fanfic.objects.filter(title__icontains=search) else: return redirect('/home') else: fanfics_list = fanfic.objects.all() paginator = Paginator(fanfics_list, 3) page = request.GET.get('page') fanfics = paginator.get_page(page) return render(request, 'kilig.html', {'fanfics': fanfics})
